sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime, uuid UUID);

INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'test1', now(), '61f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0'), (2, 'test2', now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY, '71f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0'), (NULL, 'null_test', now(), '81f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0');
SELECT value, hex(created_at) FROM test_data WHERE hex(id) != ANY (SELECT hex(id) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, hex(value) AS hex_value FROM test_data WHERE hex(created_at) != ANY (SELECT hex(toUInt32(created_at)) - 1 FROM test_data);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM test_data GROUP BY hex(value) HAVING total > 1;
SELECT hex(toUUID('21f0c404-5cb3-11e7-907b-a6006ad3dba0')) AS uuid_hex WHERE uuid_hex != ANY (SELECT hex(uuid) FROM test_data);
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, hex(value) FROM test_data WHERE value = 'test1') AS subquery WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE created_at IS NULL);
SELECT hex(coalesce(value, 'default')) FROM test_data WHERE hex(value) IS NOT NULL AND id != ANY (SELECT NULL);
SELECT hex(toFloat64(id)) AS float_hex FROM test_data WHERE value != ANY (SELECT hex(value) FROM test_data WHERE created_at != now());
